text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It feels so good to cross the finish line in the lead!
This is why I could never quit racing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I got to look cool, so I'm super happy
with how that went!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There's a whole storm of wins coming our way,
Trainer, and you've got the best seat in the
house. Just you wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to train real hard and win the
next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And I'm going to have to aim higher
and higher to make that happen!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
First things first! Time to look back on my
performance today and analyze what I did right
and wrong!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I want to win first place again, I can't afford to
get lax! Hup!
